hero.subtext: Fantini Cosmi air purification and ventilation systems — engineered in Italy, available in Georgia.

categories.sectionSubtitle: Two categories of premium air systems for every home

recuperators.title: Recuperators
recuperators.description: Heat-recovery ventilation. Fresh air in, energy stays in.

about.headline: Design meets power and sustainability
about.body: Alivo is Georgia's trusted partner for premium indoor air quality solutions. We bring Fantini Cosmi's Italian engineering expertise to homes and businesses across Georgia — combining cutting-edge technology with a commitment to healthier living.

mission.label: Mission
mission.text: To make clean, fresh air accessible to every home in Georgia through world-class ventilation technology.

vision.label: Vision
vision.text: A Georgia where every family breathes air as pure as the mountains — indoors, every day.

reviews.sectionSubtitle: Real results from real homes across Georgia

blogs.sectionSubtitle: Insights on air quality, ventilation and healthy living

footer.tagline: Premium air purification for Georgian homes.
footer.formSubtitle: Our team will help you choose the right system for your home.

modal.title: Get in Touch
modal.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
modal.name: Full Name
modal.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

fantini.headline: Italian Engineering Since 1951
fantini.body: Fantini Cosmi was founded in Milan over 70 years ago and has grown into one of Europe's leading manufacturers of ventilation and climate control systems. Every product combines precision Italian engineering with rigorous quality standards — built to last, built to perform.
